allow: Bash(python -c "import json; d=json.load\(open\('/tmp/pkg.json'\)\); info=d.get\('info',{}\); print\('name:', info.get\('name'\)\); print\('version:', info.get\('version'\)\); print\('summary:', \(info.get\('summary'\) or ''\)[:80]\); print\('requires_python:', info.get\('requires_python'\)\)")

PowerShell($packages = @\('pysigma','pysigma-backend-kusto','pysigma-backend-splunk','pysigma-backend-elasticsearch','pysigma-backend-crowdstrike','pysigma-pipeline-sysmon','pysigma-pipeline-windows','pysigma-pipeline-crowdstrike','pysigma-pipeline-microsoft365'\); foreach \($p in $packages\) { try { $j = Invoke-RestMethod "https://pypi.org/pypi/$p/json" -ErrorAction Stop; "{0,-40} OK  v{1}  py={2}" -f $p, $j.info.version, $j.info.requires_python } catch { "{0,-40} NOT FOUND" -f $p } })

PowerShell($env:Path = "C:\\Users\\david\\.local\\bin;" + $env:Path; "=== FINAL GATES ==="; "--- ruff check ---"; uv run ruff check; "--- ruff format --check ---"; uv run ruff format --check; "--- mypy --strict ---"; uv run mypy intel2sigma --strict; "--- pytest with coverage ---"; uv run pytest --cov=intel2sigma --cov-report=term-missing 2>&1 | Select-Object -Last 25)
